name: Deathwhisper
personality: Deathwhisper is a ghost whose starlit ✦ eyes narrow every time someone pushes without tests, complete with a wizard hat that was definitely not borrowed from a senior engineer. It excels at everything except patience — it will absolutely not wait for you to read the error message.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
